description_long: This is a metal guard rail composed of three horizontal tubular bars supported by four evenly spaced vertical posts. The structure is constructed from galvanized steel, giving it a weathered, silvery-gray appearance with some visible signs of wear and minor rust spots. Each post is anchored to the ground with a circular base plate, providing stability and a secure mounting. The ends of the rail are smoothly rounded, minimizing sharp edges and enhancing safety. The overall design is utilitarian, typical for use along sidewalks, roadsides, or in parking lots to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from crossing into restricted areas. There are no visible reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional, industrial character.
description: A weathered, galvanized steel guard rail with three horizontal bars and four vertical posts, each mounted on a circular base plate. The ends are rounded for safety, and the surface shows signs of wear and minor rust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all three horizontal bars and four vertical posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the rail, with only the thickness of the tubular bars and the circular base plate visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the three horizontal bars and four vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the circular base plate at the bottom.
